issue.title: Inbox approval-notification i18n: subject prefix, status label, relative time
issue.description:
## Goal

Localize the inbox notification rendering for approval items. Found during [ZAI-115](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-115) visual QA — three English strings leak through when UI language is Russian:

1. **Subject prefix** — `Hire Agent: <name>` keeps `Hire Agent` hardcoded in English.
2. **Approval status badge** — `Approved` is rendered as a literal English string.
3. **Relative time** — `6h ago` is formatted in English, producing the mixed string `обновлено 6h ago`.

The wrapper word `обновлено` is already localized — the leak is in the interpolated values.

Visual: see `inbox-mine-ru.png` attached to [ZAI-115](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-115). The row shows `Hire Agent: CEO` / `Approved обновлено 6h ago`.

## Scope

Out-of-scope from [ZAI-89](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-89), which targeted `StatusBadge` / `KeyboardShortcuts` / `SidebarAgents` / `Inbox` empty state. The approval-notification row rendering is a separate component.

## Reproduction

1. Run the dev server (`pnpm -C ui dev`).
2. Open `/SDF/inbox/mine` with UI language set to Russian.
3. Observe the approval row beneath `SDF-1`.

## Acceptance

- Subject prefix uses an i18n key (e.g. `notifications.subjects.hire_agent`), interpolating the agent name.
- Approval status uses an i18n status map (Approved / Rejected / Pending — at minimum, the values that can appear in inbox rows).
- Relative time uses the locale-aware time-formatting helper already present elsewhere in the codebase (search for `formatDistanceToNow` / `formatRelativeTime` usage that already works in RU).
- `scripts/check-i18n-only-diff.sh` clean.
- Updated screenshot of the same row showing fully Russian text attached as proof.

## Files (likely)

- `ui/src/components/Inbox*.tsx` — the approval notification row.
- `ui/src/locales/{en,ru}/notifications.json` (or `inbox.json`) — new keys for subject prefixes and status labels.
- Time formatting helper — locate the existing relative-time formatter and ensure the inbox row uses it instead of an English-locked formatter.

continuationSummary.title: Continuation Summary
continuationSummary.body:
# Continuation Summary

- Issue: ZAI-119 — Inbox approval-notification i18n: subject prefix, status label, relative time
- Status: in_review
- Priority: medium
- Current mode: review
- Last updated by run: 0639e41b-3743-4dc9-86a5-e42a372f2f19
- Agent: Localization Agent (claude_local)

## Objective

## Goal

Localize the inbox notification rendering for approval items. Found during [ZAI-115](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-115) visual QA — three English strings leak through when UI language is Russian:

1. **Subject prefix** — `Hire Agent: <name>` keeps `Hire Agent` hardcoded in English.
2. **Approval status badge** — `Approved` is rendered as a literal English string.
3. **Relative time** — `6h ago` is formatted in English, producing the mixed string `обновлено 6h ago`.

The wrapper word `обновлено` is already localized — the leak is in the interpolated values.

Visual: see `inbox-mine-ru.png` attached to [ZAI-115](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-115). The row shows `Hire Agent: CEO` / `Approved обновлено 6h ago`.

## Scope

Out-of-scope from [ZAI-89](/ZAI/issues/ZAI-89), which targeted `StatusBadge` / `KeyboardShortcuts` / `SidebarAgents` / `Inbox` empty state. The approval-notification row rendering is a separate component.

## Reproduction

1. Run the dev server (`pnpm -C ui dev`).
2. Open `/SDF/inbox/mine` with UI language set to Russian.
3. Observe the approval row beneath `SDF-1`.

## Acceptance

- Subject prefix uses an i18n key (e.g. `notifications.subjects.hire_agent`), interpol
[truncated]

## Acceptance Criteria

No explicit acceptance criteria captured.

## Recent Concrete Actions

- Run `0639e41b-3743-4dc9-86a5-e42a372f2f19` finished with status `succeeded` at 2026-05-07T10:21:47.082Z.
- The issue moved to `in_review` — expected for execution-policy issues, where the board/human QA reviews before final close. The work is complete.

**Summary of changes committed (commit `13d57293`):**

- **`ui/src/lib/timeAgo.ts`**: Added optional `locale` parameter to `timeAgo()`. When provided, uses `Intl.RelativeTimeFormat` — so `6h ago` becomes `6 часов назад` in Russian. Existing callers with no `locale` arg are unaffected.

- **`ui/src/pages/Inbox.tsx`** (`ApprovalInboxRow`):
  1. **Subject prefix**: `ta(\`payload.type_${approval.type}\`)` looks up `"Нанять агента"` from `approvals.json` — `"Hire Agent: CEO"` → `"Нанять агента: CEO"`.
  2. **Status badge**: `ta(\`status.${approval.status}\`)` resolves `"Согласовано"` from `approvals.status.*` — `"Approved"` → `"Согласовано"`.
  3. **Relative time**: `timeAgo(approval.updatedAt, i18n.language)` passes the current locale — `"6h ago"` → `"6 часов назад"`.

- `scripts/check-i18n-only-diff.sh HEAD~1..HEAD` → **OK**. `tsc --noEmit` → **exit 0**. No new locale keys needed.

## Files / Routes Touched

- `ui/src/lib/timeAgo.ts`
- `ui/src/pages/Inbox.tsx`
- `scripts/check-i18n-only-diff.sh`
- `scripts/paperclip-issue-update.sh`

## Commands Run

- Heartbeat run `0639e41b-3743-4dc9-86a5-e42a372f2f19` invoked adapter `claude_local`.
- Detailed shell/tool commands remain in the run log and transcript.

## Blockers / Decisions

- No new blocker was recorded by the latest run.

## Next Action

- Wait for reviewer feedback or approval before continuing executor work.
